description:
These are the most important, simple YouTube analytics for growth!

Claim your .Store with your channel name asap for $.99 here: https://go.store/nate4 
NOTE: Search for your desired name, then click through to the order page and add the code "NATE4" to make the deal happen!

PERSONALIZED HELP 📈:
Join my Creators group for outside help: https://www.radicalyt.com/howdy
My strategy for winning on YouTube: https://youtu.be/2ca5g-OBhW4
My FIIRE Method for building a growth sequence: https://youtu.be/6k6IkqHjKr0
Business/personal consulting: https://radicalyt.com/ 

IDEATION 💡:
My SEAS method for picking winning ideas: https://youtu.be/ovHER9A1gQk
AI-backed customized-to-channel ideation + titles: https://vidiq.com/nateblack/

RUNNING A CHANNEL ⚙️:
The free template I made (and recommend) for running a YouTube channel (ideas, production, timeline, goals) guide: https://youtu.be/AH8Tcqu9cB4

RECORDING 🎙️:
Microphone I use: https://amzn.to/47PBzvz
Mic arm for the above: https://amzn.to/3GjdYYi 
Lav mic I've used for hundreds of videos: https://amzn.to/3utYCgV
Lighting really good for talking head videos: https://amzn.to/3uBbZw0

Connect outside YouTube 🧡:
Instagram (behind the scenes): https://www.instagram.com/thatnateblack/
X/Threads (thoughts): https://twitter.com/thatnateblack

Have feedback, a thank you, or a content idea for Nate? Go here: https://airtable.com/appRehiGj54f9ETNc/pagxKUW2N5cnpYCNd/form 

#growonyoutube #youtubeanalytics

BE RADICAL
